title: tulipa clusiana f. cashmeriana
intro: Tulipa clusiana f. cashmeriana, also known as the 'Carnival de Rotselaer', is a rare and delicate variety of the tulip plant that belongs to the Liliaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tulipa clusiana f. cashmeriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, to promote respiratory health and combat infections, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
